rules.pattern: When will you go back to America?
rules.replacement: When will you come back to America?

rules.pattern: I will go to Beijing tomorrow
rules.replacement: Tomorrow I will go to Beijing

rules.pattern: He spends 2 hours learning English every day
rules.replacement: He every day spends 2 hours learn English

rules.pattern: I like the film very much
rules.replacement: I very much like the film

rules.pattern: Are you sure you want to delete this?
Server is busy. Please try again later.

rules.replacement: Wish you have a good trip

rules.pattern: This feature is easy to use
rules.replacement: Users can use this function conveniently

rules.pattern: This feature is not available yet
rules.replacement: This function is not supported temporarily

rules.pattern: We will continue to improve this app
rules.replacement: We will continuously optimize this app

rules.pattern: This version fixes several known issues
rules.replacement: This version fixes some known problems

rules.pattern: Too many requests. Please try again later.

rules.replacement: Please operate according to the prompt

rules.pattern: Please do not refresh this page
rules.replacement: Please do not refresh the page

rules.pattern: You don’t have access to this page
rules.replacement: You do not have access to this page

rules.pattern: This API is used to retrieve data
rules.replacement: This interface is used to get data

rules.pattern: This attraction has a long history
rules.replacement: This scenic spot has a long history

rules.pattern: It’s a great place for photos
rules.replacement: It is very suitable to take photos here

rules.pattern: There are many great local dishes

rules.replacement: This place is worth to visit

rules.pattern: You can spend a full day here
rules.replacement: You can play here for one day

rules.pattern: We’ll take care of it as soon as possible
rules.replacement: We will deal with it as soon as possible
Please feel free to contact us
We are always at your service

rules.pattern: This app is ideal for beginners
rules.replacement: This app is very suitable for beginners

rules.pattern: This feature helps users solve problems
rules.replacement: This function can help users solve problems

rules.pattern: Users can get a better experience with this feature
rules.replacement: Users can better experience this function

rules.pattern: This feature is mainly used to
rules.replacement: This function is mainly used to

rules.pattern: This app is designed with user experience in mind
rules.replacement: This app focuses on user experience

rules.pattern: This version adds a lot of new content
rules.replacement: This version adds many new contents

rules.pattern: This app is easy to use
rules.replacement: This app is easy to operate

rules.pattern: Your account is logged in on another device
rules.replacement: The account has been logged in elsewhere

rules.pattern: Your account security level is low
This system uses a distributed architecture
The air here is very clean
rules.replacement: The air here is very fresh

rules.pattern: Many visitors come here each year
rules.replacement: Many tourists come here every year
It is suitable for family travel

rules.pattern: You can experience local culture here
rules.replacement: You can enjoy local culture here

rules.pattern: This place is rich in history
rules.replacement: This place is full of history
The night view is very beautiful

rules.pattern: There are many shopping options nearby
rules.replacement: There are many shopping places nearby

rules.pattern: We’ll get back to you as soon as possible
rules.replacement: We will reply as soon as possible

rules.pattern: If you run into any issues
Your feedback is important to us
rules.replacement: Your feedback is very important to us
We attach great importance to this issue

rules.pattern: go on to do (继续做另一件事)
go on doing (继续做同一件事)
